name: feature_context_selection_and_prompt_generation
purpose: Detect the most relevant business feature group for a request, load the matching context bundle, and produce a prompt plus execution plan for downstream AI agents.

related_ext_files.role: Ranks business features using feature metadata, learned keywords, entry points, and core entities.
Builds a service-aware context bundle containing features, flows, integrations, and override paths.
Builds the final prompt and the structured prompt-rewrite variant for AI agents.
Creates deterministic execution steps from the selected feature context and detected intent.
Classifies the request into planning styles like investigate, repair, validate, or implement.

notes: This is the primary happy-path feature for known business features already represented under /ai.
The output is structured so multiple AI agents can consume the same result consistently.
